a:r.a:t: To align HGV job titles with standardized roles used in compensation surveys, PwC developed ‘Rolled-Up’ positions that group multiple HGV job titles into broader categories. The job titles included within each rolled-up position below have been
reviewed, confirmed, and validated with HGV
HGV Job Titles Included in Rolled up Position
Sales Executive In House, Sales Executive In House – Remote, Sales Executive In House – Virtual
InHouse Sales Spec II, Inhouse Sales Specialist, Inv Spec-Team Lead, Inventory Spec-Comm Only, Mgr, Sales-Resorts, Supv, IH Sales Specialist, Supv, Sr Sales Specialist
Sales Manager II, Sr Manager Sales Action Line, Sr Manager Sales Action Line TO, Sr Manager Sales In House, Sr Manager Sales In House TO, Sr Manager Sales TO, Sr Mgr, Sales, Mgr, In House Sales
Manager Training Sales, Sr Manager Sales TO Training & Development, Sr Manager Sales Training
Director Sales I, Director Sales II, Director Sales III, Sr Director Sales I, Sr Director Sales II
Vice President of Sales and Marketing
VP Area Sales II, VP Area Sales III, VP Owner and Member Marketing, VP Regional Marketing, VP Regional Sales, VP Sales II, VP Sales III, VP, Bluegreen Ventures
Greeter Marketing OPC, Marketing Representative OPC, OPC Representative
Greeter Marketing In House, In House Marketing Rep, In House Marketing-BCW, Marketing Representative In House, Marketing Representative In House Pre Arrival
Manager Marketing OPC, Sr Manager Marketing OPC

Manager In House Marketing I, Manager In House Marketing II, Manager In House Marketing III, Manager In House Marketing IV, Manager In House Marketing V, Manager Marketing In House, Mgr, In House Marketing, Sr Manager In House Marketing I, Sr Manager In House Marketing II, Sr Manager Marketing In House
Director Marketing II, Director Marketing III, Sr Director Marketing, Sr Director Marketing II
Agent Activations, Agent Member Marketing Activation, Agent Outbound, Agent Owner Activations, Agent Owner Marketing
Agent Call Transfer, Agent Concierge, Agent Customer Care, Agent Member Pre-Arrival, Agent New Member Journey CC, Agent VIP Reservations, Reservationist
Manager Activations, Manager Outbound, Manager Owner Marketing, Sr Manager Activations, Sr Manager Outbound

Manager Call Transfer, Manager Concierge, Manager Customer Care, Manager Marketing, Manager Marketing PreArrival, Manager VIP Reservations, Sr Manager Call Transfer, Sr Manager New Member Journey, Sr Manager VIP Reservations, Sr. Manager New Member Journey CC
Director Customer Care, Director Outbound, Sr Director Customer Care
*Bluegreen “Sales Rep” and “Tele-Sales Rep” titles have been excluded from HGV averages given the roles are blended (action line and in-house) and might skew results.
